title: General protocol for SLC protein purification
author: David B. Sauer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol is used to purify the SLC transporter expressed in Expi293FTM Cells using detergent solubilization followed by a series of different chromatographic methods. Depending on the nature of the expression construct and experimental requirements, the GFP tags can be removed using a proteolytic reaction
steps_raw: This protocol is used to purify the SLC transporter expressed in Expi293FTM Cells using detergent solubilization followed by a series of different chromatographic methods. Depending on the nature of the expression construct and experimental requirements, the GFP tags can be removed using a proteolytic reaction
